candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line and best semantic match for total revenue/sales.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income item, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income item, not revenue.
Bottom-line total comprehensive income, not revenue.
Non-operating/non-recurring item, not revenue.
Direct match for cost of sales / direct production costs.

candidates.row_label: Leasing and other cost of premises
candidates.why: Operating overhead/facilities cost, not core COGS.
Ambiguous/non-standard cost line and not clearly COGS.
Personnel cost; core SG&A component.
Broad overhead bucket; acceptable when explicit SG&A line is unpopulated in preview.
Selling/marketing overhead component.
Explicit SG&A row exists, but appears unpopulated in preview; per rule include it and also a broader overhead bucket for coverage.

candidates.row_label: Brand/ Patents/ Trademarks/ Marketing/ Artistic Intangible, Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet intangible asset, not SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Acc Amort/Imp Brand/ Patents/ Trademarks/ Marketing/ Artistic Intang
candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization/impairment, not SG&A.
Headcount metric, not expense.

variables.notes: Used the explicit SG&A line even though it is unpopulated in the preview, and added broad overhead buckets per the stated hierarchy. Avoided depreciation/amortization and totals.
No dedicated research/development expense line is visible on the income statement.

candidates.why: Best direct match for recurring interest cost; preferred over totals and underlying lease-only subcomponent.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost but appears to be a subcomponent of Interest expense, so using both would double count.
Additional recurring finance cost line that can supplement interest expense.
Earnings allocation item, not finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure duplicating the lease-interest component; do not combine with main interest expense.
Valuation/unrealized item, excluded by rule.
Balance sheet liability, not expense.
Balance sheet liability, not expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring finance-cost rows and avoided total/net finance cost rows and non-recurring valuation items.

candidates.row_label: Profit attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Income statement profit line, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Income statement OCI line, not book equity.
Liability, not equity.
Equity component only, not total owner equity.
Best match for equity attributable to shareholders; excludes non-controlling interests based on reconciliation to Total Equity.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred for BE when separate NCI line exists.
Shareholder count, not equity amount.

variables.notes: Preferred owner/shareholder equity because separate non-controlling interests are reported.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not balance sheet minority interest stock.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Income statement OCI allocation, not balance sheet minority interest.
Direct balance sheet match for minority interest / NCI.
Alternative label for the same concept; useful as fallback priority.
Income statement total attributable profit line, not balance sheet NCI.

variables.notes: Selected balance sheet NCI labels as priority list; later code can use the first available label by year.
